name: IN8BIO, INC.
business: A clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of gamma-delta T cell product candidates and T cell engagers (TCEs) for cancer and autoimmune diseases. Its product candidates include INB-100 (hematologic malignancies), INB-200/400 (glioblastoma), and INB-600 (TCE platform). The company has not generated any revenue and expects to incur additional losses.
namedSuppliers: Cellular Therapy Laboratory at the University of Alabama at Birmingham
Dunbar CAR-T Cell Program at the University of Louisville

exposures.sentence: We are a leading clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development and commercialization of gamma-delta T cell product candidates and T cell engagers ("TCEs") for cancer and autoimmune diseases.

catalysts.event: Complete treatment of all patients in INB-100 expansion cohort
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the treatment of all patients in the expansion cohort in early 2026 with long-term follow-up results anticipated at a medical meeting in late 2026.

catalysts.event: Provide clinical updates including mOS data from INB-200/400 at medical meetings
catalysts.sentence: We expect to provide further clinical updates, including additional mOS data from the total data set, at medical meetings in mid- and late- 2026.

catalysts.event: Present preliminary animal model data for INB-619
catalysts.sentence: We expect to present preliminary animal model data in 2026, with a goal of submitting an IND in 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Global market opportunity for GBM greater than $4 billion
tamClaims.sentence: creating a significant unmet medical need with a potential global market opportunity greater than $4 billion.
